title: Super Speedrun Mod
description: Adds an accelerated passage of the game at any difficulty level by changing some crafts and adding new ones.
body:
This modification adds an accelerated passage of the game at any difficulty level by changing some crafts and adding new ones. Also, throughout the game, the creator will "watch" you and comment on your actions in the chat (these actions include: death, raising experience, crafting, getting into other worlds, etc.).

There is a new dimension that is filled with diamond and emerald blocks, in order to get into the world, you need to create a portal from the glowstone and activate it using the troll face, which in turn is created from two wheat seeds.
